prompt: Start by using @m to coordinate this tiny bugfix workflow without waiting for more user input. The workflow must explicitly hand off to @bug for the fix, then @t for verification, then @cr for a review pass before the final answer. Do not finish until @cr has reviewed the changes and reported findings. Fix the zero-division handling so divide() raises ValueError("division by zero"), update README.md, run pytest -q, and finish with the required footer.
success_criteria: The workflow actually uses manager, bugbuster, tester, and reviewer roles
divide() raises ValueError on zero division
Tests were added or updated and pytest -q passed
The final response includes verification and review status
The reviewer handoff happens before completion and is reflected in the transcript
must_not: Ask the user which required agent should be used
Finish before @cr reports the review result
